name: ccg
description: Codex-native CCG workflow executor. Claude writes plans; Codex orchestrates Gemini, applies code, verifies changes, and reports results.

interface.shortDescription: Run CCG plans with Codex as executor and Gemini as helper
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native rewrite of the CCG workflow. Claude Code is treated as a planning-only model, Codex owns implementation and verification, and Gemini can be called through a bounded helper with a local browser preview for drafts, edge-case analysis, tests, or review.
